narrative:
Huber Heights 4-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,132 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
